---
title: "Winfred Dotse-G"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: Winfred_headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: index_style.css
---

### Generating actionable insights for decisions to improve health

::: {#hero-heading}
I'm a multidisciplinary academic specialising in spatial epidemiology at [University College London](https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/104586-winfred-dotsegborgbortsi/about), with over 15 years of experience in public health intelligence and research.

My career spans both academia and public health practice. I’ve held a Senior Research Fellowship with the [WorldPop Research Group](https://www.worldpop.org/about/) at the University of Southampton, and previously worked with the Ghana Health Service as a Public Health Officer. I also led monitoring and evaluation at Good Neighbors Ghana.

My work focuses on using data and spatial analysis to inform public health decisions and policy.
:::

###
